query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS grand_total,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND pt.paid_at >= '2026-04-01'
  AND pt.paid_at < '2026-05-01'
  AND pt.id = (
    SELECT MAX(pt_d.id)
    FROM payment_transactions pt_d
    WHERE pt_d.section = pt.section
      AND pt_d.contract_no = pt.contract_no
      AND pt_d.paid_at = pt.paid_at
      AND pt_d.amount = pt.amount
      AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt_d.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  )
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

    WHERE pt_d.section = pt.section

      AND pt_d.amount = pt.amount
